mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, name, phone, role, address, skill, avatar, status, register_type, reject_reason) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{role}, #{address}, #{skill}, #{avatar}, #{status}, #{registerType}, #{rejectReason})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE role = 'resident'
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{phone}, '%')

SELECT id, name, phone, avatar, address, create_time AS createTime FROM sys_user WHERE role = 'resident'
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{phone}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE role = 'worker'
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{phone}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE role = 'worker' AND status = 'active'
